_comment: Example value for the FLEXPRICE_KAFKA_TOPICS env-var (ECS task-def environment / k8s ConfigMap). When this env-var is set, it FULLY REPLACES the baked topics.yaml (no merge). Same schema as topics.yaml: map key = the real Kafka topic name; per-topic partitions, optional replicationFactor/retentionMs (else defaults). This sample mirrors prod us-west-2 (prod-flexprice-msk-us) real topic names + live partition counts. Set the partition counts to the cluster's actual live counts so reconcile is a no-op on existing topics (it only creates missing ones and grows when the spec exceeds live; it never shrinks or deletes). Put the JSON on ONE line in the env-var value. Remove this _comment key before use.
